title: SlideyBoats
description: a mod pack that has everything you could need to start or even set records in boat racing.
body:
SlideyBoat is a mod pack that has everything you could need to start or even set records in boat racing. With this you have no excuse not to win the next FC1.(please make your fov 90-quakepro and ignore the xaeros minimap update warning just say no to it)

the mods included in this pack are as follows:

- smoothsteer(no-mouse) - hands down the best ice boat racing mod out there, it has a clean racing hud but most importantly it shifts the camera relative to the angle your boat is facing without needing to steer with your mouse(however, this can be tricky at first especially with reverse entries and 'spacebarring'(disengaging the camera rotation), so feel free to disable or lower the intensity and slowly get used to it)
- xaeros minimap - gives crucial intel on upcoming turns
- simple voice chat - you need this to tactically distract your opponents in FC1n2
- boatutils BA(blind attack) - this mod not only gives you the ability to run rally tracks with dirt blocks but also 3D ice tracks
- bobby - this mod keeps chunks loaded and allows loading render distances greater than the servers view-distance setting
- worldedit - if you ever decide to make your own tracks, this mod can come in handy, especially the brush tool(when paired with lasersloths Create-A-Track map, it is the ultimate track building setup, you can download it at - https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/create-a-track-ice-boat-racing-track-template/)
- antighost - most ice boat racing servers are small-scale making these ghost blocks prominent and this mod essential
- debugify - removed bugs...
- starlight - imrpoves lighting performance and fixes more bugs
- mod menu -  allows you to view your mods and change settings, if you dont like mine :(
- sodium - so many mods, oh my, you need that extra fps
- clothconfig - dependency for smoothsteer
- fabric api - fabric mod... so yeah you kinda need it i think

if you are new, a few servers to get you started can be - frosthex(frosthex.com), BWRC(brwc.grub-bros.de) and boatlabs(mc.boatlabs.net)
also make sure to join the appleseed discord :)
